headline: This is why Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK) is one of Steve Cohen’s large-cap Stock Picks
summary: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) is one of billionaire Steve Cohen’s large-cap stock picks with the highest upside potential. On May 4, Autodesk introduced Autodesk for Small Business, a program designed to help freelancers, small teams, and growing firms in the Design and Make industries. With more than one‑third of professionals now working independently, Autodesk aims to provide […]

headline: Why AI layoffs aren't giving stocks the boost companies wanted
summary: AI-driven layoffs have become a defining theme across the tech industry over the past year, with some sources estimating more than 112,000 U.S. jobs being lost to AI since the start of 2025. While major companies like HP and Amazon have often framed these cuts as a way to boost efficiency and shift focus toward new technologies, investors themselves don't appear convinced that these layoffs will improve companies' bottom lines in the long run.

headline: Autodesk, Commerce, Q2 Holdings, Upstart, and monday.com Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the morning session after the April PPI report sent Treasury yields to 10-month highs, with the 10-year yield rising to 4.49%.
